sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33351" key="e)laioplh/qhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιο-πλήθης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n33351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.70B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.70B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
